steps.note: 13 data-source contracts grounded against publishers (10 tier A, 3 tier B). Original 12 incl. China (nbs/pboc marginals_only, safe mixed) merged to main via PR #2. REOPENED to add bis_cbs (BIS Consolidated Banking Statistics, tier A, bilateral) — the counterparty-nationality basis DP2 found missing. Grounding falsified naive guesses against the publisher (ultimate-risk is published as 'Guarantor basis' CBS_BASIS=U, not 'UR'; key 5A/position-S corrected); integrity critic BLOCKED an ungrounded L_MEASURE=S code in the headline observation, fixed by adding the CL_STOCK_FLOW excerpt (S = Amounts outstanding/Stocks). Determination: CBS-UR NARROWS but does NOT CLOSE the DP2 China HOLE (bank-claims leg only; non-bank securities/Treasury leg and offshore-SPV issuer-nationality remain uncovered). REOPENED AGAIN for imf_cpis: the DP2 audit (build/audit/cpis_probe.json) proved CPIS bilateral was OBTAINABLE — DP2's HOLE was a US-vs-ISO3-USA query bug, not absent data. Coverage census (build/contracts/cpis_coverage.json, integrity-critic PASS) establishes the bilateral matrix is DENSE in the counterpart dimension and among 83/259 reporting economies, SPARSE in the reporter dimension (176 non-reporters; VGB the one load-bearing reporter hole). CPIS RESTORES the bilateral structure F3/F4 need but is RESIDENCY-based and does NOT close the offshore-SPV issuer-nationality gap (distinct, carried-forward hole). Carry-forward requirements for the DP2 re-run recorded in build/audit/dp2_rerun_requirements.md (fix claims/liabilities label swap; persist RAS column-targets for reproducibility; do not assume the ~$711bn BIS marginal-asymmetry floor collapses when CPIS cells populate).

RE-RUN (supersedes prior DP2) on the CPIS-augmented matrix. 873 OBSERVED cells (Fed EFA 585, TIC 36+residual, BIS LBS 76, COFER 9, + 167 CPIS bilateral portfolio cells; 0 ESTIMATED) — delta +167 vs prior 706 (prior had CPIS as a HOLE on a query bug). Audit corrections applied and integrity-critic VERIFIED (PASS): (1) claims/liabilities label swap fixed and checked against BIS source (C=claims $9.53tn, L=liabilities $10.24tn, hand-summed); (2) residual now REPRODUCIBLE — build/model/ras_inputs.json persists row/col targets + seed; build/results/dp2_recompute_check.py regenerates it from disk alone (passed=true); (3) NO assumed collapse — CPIS block is a labeled CONSISTENCY pass (no independent portfolio marginal on disk), and the binding residual is the irreducible ~$711.16bn BIS claims/liabilities marginal floor, untouched by CPIS. Offshore-hub cells (US->CYM $2.8tn etc.) kept basis=residency, NOT reallocated; offshore-SPV issuer-nationality fraction a bounded cell-level HOLE in 3 artifacts. Largest residual = the $711bn BIS floor. DP3 not begun.
